envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key — get from simmer.markets/dashboard

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Only needed for external-wallet self-custody trading. Not required when using managed wallets.

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: Optional. Set to 'sim' for paper trading or 'kalshi' for Solana trading. Defaults to 'polymarket'.

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_ENTRY_THRESHOLD
envVars.description: Buy when bucket price below this (default 0.15).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_EXIT_THRESHOLD
envVars.description: Sell when price above this (default 0.45).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_MAX_POSITION_USD
envVars.description: Max USD per trade (default 2.00).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_SIZING_PCT
envVars.description: Smart-sizing fraction of available balance (default 0.05).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_MAX_TRADES_PER_RUN
envVars.description: Max trades per scan cycle (default 5).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_LOCATIONS
envVars.description: Comma-separated cities (default 'NYC'). Supported: NYC, Chicago, Seattle, Atlanta, Dallas, Miami.

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_BINARY_ONLY
envVars.description: Set true to skip range-bucket events and only trade binary yes/no markets (default false).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_SLIPPAGE_MAX
envVars.description: Skip trades with slippage above this (default 0.15 = 15%).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_MIN_LIQUIDITY
envVars.description: Skip markets with liquidity below this USD threshold (default 0 = disabled).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_ORDER_TYPE
envVars.description: Order type: GTC (default, limit waits for fill) or FAK (cancel if not filled immediately).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_VOL_TARGETING
envVars.description: Enable volatility targeting for dynamic position sizing (default false).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_TARGET_VOL
envVars.description: Target annualized volatility when vol_targeting is enabled (default 0.20 = 20%).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_VOL_MAX_LEVERAGE
envVars.description: Max scale-up multiplier from vol targeting (default 2.0).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_VOL_MIN_ALLOC
envVars.description: Min allocation floor from vol targeting (default 0.2).

envVars.name: SIMMER_WEATHER_VOL_SPAN
envVars.description: EWMA span for vol calculation; lower = more responsive (default 10).

envVars.name: SIMMER_PORTFOLIO_CAP_ENABLED
envVars.description: Enable portfolio-level concurrent-exposure cap (cross-skill open notional ceiling). Default false (off). When enabled, trims or skips trades that would push total open notional across all skills above SIMMER_PORTFOLIO_CAP_PCT of bankroll.

envVars.name: SIMMER_PORTFOLIO_CAP_PCT
envVars.description: Total open notional cap as a fraction of bankroll (default 0.15 = 15%). Only used when SIMMER_PORTFOLIO_CAP_ENABLED is true. Layers on top of per-trade sizing.

tunables.label: Min market liquidity in USD (0 = disabled)
Total open notional cap (fraction of bankroll)
